project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspaces + Turborepo) - 9-app interconnected platform
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with Turborepo, ESM modules, tsconfig composite references
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with global test APIs (describe, it, expect), mock Prisma pattern using vi.fn()
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm turbo typecheck to confirm no type errors. 2. Run pnpm turbo test to confirm all tests pass.
setup_instructions: pnpm install at root. Packages without package.json need one created first.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install from npm registries. No Docker daemon expected. No actual database connections - tests use mocks.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits (feat/fix/chore), TypeScript strict mode, no 'any', Zod validation, crypto.randomBytes for security (not Math.random), every service file gets co-located .test.ts
key_patterns: 1. Package structure: package.json with type:module, main/types pointing to src/index.ts, scripts: typecheck/test/build. 2. Services use class-based architecture with dependency injection (Prisma/Redis passed to constructor). 3. Tests use createMockPrisma() or createMockRedis() patterns with vi.fn(). 4. Queue uses TypedQueue from @quant/queue with Zod schemas. 5. Apps have backend/ with app.ts (Fastify), routes/, services/, __tests__/, types.ts. 6. Prisma schema already has UserRelationship/RelationshipType/DatingProfile models.
directory_structure: apps/ (9 apps: quantads, quantai, quantchat, quantedits, quantmail, quantmax, quantneon, quantsync, quantube) | packages/ (shared libs: auth, database, data-plane, queue, storage, media, payments, notifications, search, social-graph, etc.) | services/ (microservices: cdc-relay, identity, ws-gateway, ads-api, etc.)
